rootNode.ResponseMSG: The INSERT statement conflicted with the FOREIGN KEY constraint "fk_TransactionPhysicalStock_CurrencyId". The conflict occurred in database "DA2078", table "dbo.tbl_Currency", column 'CurrencyId'. The statement has been terminated.
